/CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(A), A STRAIGHT SENTENCE/AJW/DNACOMP/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 TO 3 YEARS THE UPPER TERM/STATES/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(5)(A), THE SENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:CJ 3Y/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 276 DAYS COUNTY JAIL PLUS 276   DAYSPC 4019 FOR A TOTAL OF 552 DAYS/COA:40/ICNA/VF4:240/COLLECT/
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:12//FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:03-23-12/REMA/ARBUCKLE/VD:03-16-12 JURY TRIAL/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER LUIS BENAVIDEZ/EXHMA:DEFENSE EXHIBIT A:MUG SHOT OF ALVARO MARAVILLAS/EXHM:DEFENSE EXHIBIT B:ANGELINAB,'S WRITTEN STATEMENT/ARG&SUB/X:THE MAGISTRATE FINDS THE OFFENSE OF PENAL CODE SECTION 243,4(E)(1), MISDEMEANOR, A LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE WITHIN COUNTS 1, 2, 3, 4 AND 5, PENAL CODE SECTION 243,4(A), SHOWN BY THE EVIDENCE,HAVE BEEN COMMITTED; THAT THEREIS SUFFICIENT CAUSE TO BELIEVE THE ABOVE NAMED DEFENDANT GUILTY THEREOF, ITIS ORDERED THAT SAID DEFENDANT BE HELDTO ANSWER TO THE SAME,/HTA1:6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, AND 13/CTORD:COUNT 14 CERTIFY/BAIL:500,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/X:THE EXHIBITSARE RETURNED TO DEFENSE COUNSEL,/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HEARING/X:DEFENSE CALLED THE COURTROOM AND IS UNABLE TOAPPEAR BECAUSE OF A DEATH IN THE FAMILY,/X:NO APPEARANCE BY COUNSEL FOR THE PEOPLE,/CONT/DOP/TE:1 DAY/

/CAL:NON-PARTY MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAED RECORDS/X:APPEARANCE BY KEVAN FORNASERO ON BEHALF OF FACEBOOK,/X:PROOF OF SERVICE FILED IN COURT,/CONTD:STATUS & MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAED RECORDS/DOP/

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION FOR DEMURRER/X:COURT HEARS ARGUMENTS FROM RESPECTIVE COUNSEL,/X:DEMURRER IS DENIED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 10-03-11/CONTD:PREHEARINGCONFERENCE & DISCOVERY STATUS/DOP/
